hand.title: Daily Hand

events.text: Your cards — A, A. Both players called a raise before the cards were dealt.
Turn — 3. Your opponent led out with a bet. You called.
River — 7. Your opponent fired again — half the pot.

wrongReasons: A 5 is close, but the river lead is the tell. The correct hand picked up more on the river than A 5 would have.
Q J is close, but the river lead is the tell. The correct hand picked up more on the river than Q J would have.
8 10 is close, but the river lead is the tell. The correct hand picked up more on the river than 8 10 would have.
hand.explanation:
Answer: Q 9

Your opponent flopped a straight and immediately raised to build the pot. They led every remaining street — consistent value betting across all streets is a strong signal of a made hand.
